label: DL5_NEURON
tissue_context: spinal cord (alar plate, dorsal neural tube)
evidence: HDCA Supplementary Table 9 assigns DL5_NEURON to broad_celltype CNS_SPINAL_NEURON, systems NERVOUS_SYSTEM, CL term CL:0000540. Top gene signature (ASCL1,PAX3,TFAP2A,INSM1,TFAP2B,DLL3,HOXB2,TOX3,MIAT,HOXD3,RCOR2,ADGRG1,SRRM4,HOXA3,ELAVL3,IRX2,GADD45G,NHLH1,DPYSL4,DCX) matches canonical dI5 (Class B Lbx1+/Lmx1b+ glutamatergic interneuron) markers documented in Lu 2015, Castellani 2013, Gray de Cristoforis 2020.
